clause.title: Daylight sensor and dynamic lighting control device

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: A daylight sensor and dynamic control device for artificial lighting must, in response to the measured level of available daylight in the range 50–1000 lux—

ol.li: for high pressure discharge lights, switch lights on and off with a programmable delay and switching differential; and
for all other lights, dim continuously or step lighting output down in not less than 4 steps so that the lowest power setting is less than 50% of full power.
